name: Creole Baked Cod
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat 1 tablespoon corn oil over medium heat.
2. Add 1/4 cup sliced mushrooms, 1/4 cup coarsely chopped onion, and 1/4 cup coarsely chopped green bell pepper; stir frequently until tender, about 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Add 2 cups chopped tomatoes, 1/2 teaspoon dried basil, and 1/4 teaspoon black pepper. Stir occasionally until the sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
4. Place 1 lb cod, cut into 1-inch cubes, in a 10x6x2-inch baking dish. Spoon the sauce over the fish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes or until the fish flakes easily.
